message:
🐛 Fix NaN% in token usage widget when limit is zero (#2048)

Guard against division by zero in useTokenUsage when limit is 0
(from corrupted localStorage settings). Three fixes:
- getAlertLevel returns 'normal' when limit <= 0
- percentage calculation returns 0 instead of NaN
- Initialization resets limit to default if loaded value is <= 0

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
